title: Turn Again, O Light

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A G F#m Bm)
Oh, how the land remembers grace,
Whispers of favor in the quiet space,
A dream reborn, a spark divine,
Calling us home through the sands of time.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: (A G Bm F#m)
You’ve turned from anger’s fierce embrace,
Your love has healed this wounded place,
Mercy flows where deserts lie,
The broken heart finds wings to fly.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: (D A G F#m)
Will You not breathe, O Spirit’s flame,
Revive us now, we call Your name,
Peace and justice, hand in hand,
Rising like rivers through the land.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (G D A Bm)
Turn again, O Light of Days,
Shine on paths that lose their way,
Mercy meets truth in the kiss of dawn,
From earth to sky, hope marches on.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: (A G Bm F#m)
Faithful steps on sacred ground,
Where songs of old still resound,
Through shadowed vale and golden shore,
The promise holds, forevermore.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: (Bm A G F#m)
Here heaven and earth collide,
Justice flows like an endless tide,
The clouds open wide, the harvest sings,
As peace descends on eagle’s wings.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: (G D A Bm)
Turn again, O Light of Days,
Shine on paths that lose their way,
Mercy meets truth in the kiss of dawn,
From earth to sky, hope marches on.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (A G F#m Bm)
Oh, how the land remembers grace,
Whispers of favor in the quiet space,
A dream reborn, a spark divine,
Guiding us home through the sands of time.

epigraph: but let them not turn again to folly
